content_of_post_to_comment: Petty fuckers who weaponize vulnerability and use someone else’s pain as ammunition are nothing but miserable people suffering inside. Because healthy people don’t do that. Healthy people don’t reach for someone’s deepest wounds just because they’re angry. Take time to heal yourselves, motherfuckers. Stop bleeding on people who trusted you. Stop turning pain into a personality. And stop making your unhealed wounds everyone else’s problem. Misery has always been desperate for company.
comment: There’s an interesting line between accountability and condemnation here. Sometimes naming harmful behavior helps break cycles, but sometimes turning pain into a villain story can become another way pain keeps control.
